features: FOR DELICATE AREAS - Developed for sensitive areas like armpits and bikinizone, including external labia, pubic area and bum.
SOFTER REGROWTH – Softer, smoother regrowth with less ingrown hairs compared to shaving.
QUICK AND EFFECTIVE – Hair-free smooth skin in 4-8 minutes. Removes short and long hair close to the root, giving you smoothness for longer.
DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED – Suitable for all skin types. Enriched with sweet almond oil and shea butter, leaving the skin soft and moisturized.
HIGH QUALITY PRODUCT – Modern 10-ingredient formula: +90% natural origin, no polymers, no common fragrance allergens. Vegan, cruelty-free, and made in Spain.
description: Product Description womn Hair Removal Cream, for hair-free smooth skin & softer regrowth vs. shaving Hair-free smooth skin in 4-8 minutes. Removes short and long hair close to the root, giving you smoothness for longer. easy to use Quick guide: Benefits & usage Apply generously – All hairs must be well covered to achieve optimal results. Leave on for 4-8 minutes – The time needed may vary, but when the hair comes off easily, it's the perfect moment.
